prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UNV-DAMQS-BUN-6PC-2PK-SML-BLCK Product Type: CABLE_TIE Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: (12-Pack) D-Ring Hook and Loop Quick Straps Adjustable Multi-Purpose Tie Down Description: The 12pc Reusable Tie Down Strap Set is the ideal companion for electrical wires, cables, ropes, hoses and just about anything you can wrap these guys around.

They feature an adjustable hook and loop backing making the usable length 9-1/2" to 16". Search Terms: arts crafts sewing fabric adhesive Features: - Adjustable Length: 9-1/2" to 16" - D-Ring Loop - Hook & Loop Closure - Color: Black - Length: 16" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 12-Pack Black D-Ring Hook and Loop Tie Down

tokens.name: D-Ring Hook and Loop Tie Down

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 12-pk 16" Black D-Ring Hook and Loop Straps

anthropic.title_differentiation: Adjustable 95 To 16 Inches, Reusable Hook And Loop Closure, Multi-Purpose Cable Straps

openai.title_differentiation: Adjustable 9-12" To 16", Reusable Tie Downs, D-Ring Loop, Hook And Loop Closure, For Cables Wires Hoses Ropes
